_README: TEMPLATE — copy to config.<client>-<market>.json (gitignored) for per-client defaults. All fields optional; the agent may pass any of these as params instead. Marketplace is the country code used in the report payload (US, DE, IT, UK, ...). See README.md.

sqp._comment: One entry per ASIN group => one CSV file per group (matches inputs.sqp_csvs in the ad-audit config). reporting_range: weekly|monthly. period_end_dates: period-END dates YYYY-MM-DD (America/Los_Angeles), e.g. week-ending Saturdays.

business_report._comment: legacy_report_id: 102:DetailSalesTrafficByChildItem (child ASIN — default) | ...ByParentItem | ...BySKU | 102:SalesTrafficTimeSeries. granularity DAY|WEEK|MONTH. asins optional (omit for account-wide).
